title: Did F&O or intraday trading last year? Your ITR filing due date isn't July 31
summary: In India, intraday and F&amp;O trading profits are taxed differently. Intraday trading is speculative business income, while F&amp;O is non-speculative. Taxpayers must file ITR-3 or ITR-4 depending on specific conditions. Here are the deadlines.

title: Claiming a deceased family member's mutual funds made less cumbersome: What SEBI has changed
summary: SEBI has asked AMFI to simplify the industry's transmission norms, making it less cumbersome for nominees and legal heirs to claim rights on mutual funds after the investor's death. Here's what changed under the revised framework.

title: Aadhaar app crosses 4 crore downloads: Full list of services available on the new app
summary: The new Aadhaar app achieved 40 million downloads so far. The redesigned app replaces mAadhaar aap and offers a wide range of Aadhaar-related services. Full list here.

title: Buying gold? This simple COMEX calculation can tell if you are being overcharged
summary: By converting international gold prices into Indian rates, you can find the actual gold cost in India and better understand whether your jewellery bill reflects a reasonable price.

title: HDFC Balanced Advantage Fund vs Parag Parikh Dynamic Asset Allocation: Same category, but equity exposure 71% vs 15%
summary: Balanced advantage funds can have vastly different portfolio structures despite belonging to the same SEBI category. Variations in equity, debt and cash can lead to distinct risk profiles and return outcomes, making portfolio composition an important factor to evaluate.

title: EPS rules explained: Eligibility, withdrawal and pension
summary: Confused about the Employees' Pension Scheme and its rules? This guide breaks down complex aspects, including contribution methods, eligibility, and pension calculations. With increasing cases of claim rejections, being informed is key.&nbsp;

title: Job switch leads to ₹1.69 lakh tax liability despite both employers deducting TDS correctly: Here's why Form 12B matters
summary: Switching jobs during a financial year can leave salaried employees with an unexpected tax liability even if both employers deducted TDS correctly. The gap arises because TDS is calculated employer-wise, while final tax is based on total annual income. Form 12B can help avoid this mismatch.

title: How to lock and unlock your fingerprints and iris using new Aadhaar App
summary: The Aadhaar biometric lock/unlock feature has gained significant adoption, with residents using it more than 1.91 crore times, according to MeitY. This security feature allows Aadhaar holders to prevent unauthorized biometric authentication using their fingerprints, iris and face data.

title: The NRI guilt trap: why high salaries abroad don't always create wealth
summary: Many NRIs earn in dollars but struggle to build wealth as family obligations, emotional guilt and social expectations drain savings and delay financial independence.

title: The coaching race is costing parents lakhs. Here's how to plan
summary: Parents are spending ₹2-4 lakh on coaching before college admissions. With education inflation at 10-12%, experts warn against dipping into retirement savings or taking on debt.

title: Paytm Q1 Results: Profit soars 79% YoY to Rs 220 crore; board decides not to go with bonus proposal
summary: Paytm's net profit surged seventy-nine percent year-on-year to two hundred twenty crore rupees. The company's board decided against a bonus issue at this time. title: Shapoorji secures commitments for Rs 21,350 cr from investors including Mercury Finance, Deutsche Bank
summary: Shapoorji Pallonji Group has secured investor commitments for its Rs 21,350 crore refinancing package, backed by its Tata Sons stake. The private credit deal, involving rupee and dollar debt, attracted strong interest from global distressed investors and domestic financial institutions.

title: NY Fed survey finds highest credit application rate in nearly five years
summary: Americans’ demand for new credit hit a near five-year high in June, according to New York Fed data. While applications for credit cards and auto loans eased slightly since February, mortgage demand edged up. title: Steptrade’s pre-IPO fund secures Rs 100 crore in first close
summary: Steptrade Capital has raised over Rs 100 crore in the first close of its Rs 500 crore Chanakya Opportunities Fund II. The Category II AIF will invest in growth-stage pre-IPO companies across manufacturing, energy transition and emerging technology sectors, beginning deployments in August.

title: US stocks today: US stocks open higher as chips recover, megacap earnings loom
